name: @estebanforge/pi-go-review
description_en: Go code-review tool for Pi. Grades your git diffs against the 100 Go Mistakes rubric (https://100go.co/) and returns categorized findings (Bug / Suggestion / Nit / Good pattern) with an Approve or Request-Changes verdict. Not a linter; pairs with go vet a
description_zh: Pi 的 Go 代码审查工具。根据 100 Go Mistakes 标准（https://100go.co/）对你的 git diff 评分，并返回分类结果（错误/建议/细枝末节/良好模式）以及批准或请求更改的裁决。不是 linter；与 go vet 配对
